theme: Light Mode (with specific Sleep Companion Dark Mode)
emotional_tone: Safe, human-centered, grounded, emotionally intelligent, steady.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2D3A3A]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 inside cards and sections.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for soft, approachable shapes.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento-style Control Room grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Tightly packed with gap-6, but generous internal padding (p-6) in each cell.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Center-align only major welcome titles or breathing exercise states.

components_and_surfaces.surface_strategy: Neumorphism / Clay & Crisp. Avoid glassmorphism to prevent visual refraction of health data.
components_and_surfaces.cards: Flat background (#FDFBF7), 1px subtle inner border (border-[#E5E0D8]), no heavy shadows. Add shadow-sm on hover.
components_and_surfaces.buttons: Soft but distinct. Primary uses #8A9A86 with #FDFBF7 text. Avoid pure black/white.
components_and_surfaces.navigation: Sticky top or solid side navigation. Solid background (bg-[#F9F6F0]) with a delicate bottom border.
components_and_surfaces.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized with rounded-xl, soft borders, and earthy focus rings (focus:ring-[#8A9A86]).
components_and_surfaces.charts: Use Recharts. Style lines with soft curves (type='monotone'). Use palette colors (#8A9A86, #E8A87C).
components_and_surfaces.data_testids: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='push-to-talk-button', data-testid='mood-tracker-card').

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth, breathing-paced transitions. No sudden snaps.
motion_and_interactions.breathing_timer: Framer Motion. Use a pulsing, scale-changing organic shape (scale: [1, 1.2, 1], transition: { duration: 8, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'easeInOut' }).
motion_and_interactions.voice_interaction: Subtle mic pulsing effect when listening, using scale and opacity ripples in #8A9A86.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: -translate-y-1 with subtle shadow-md for cards. Hover color explicitly defined.

calm_nature_background.description: Black and white close-up of textured foliage creating a calming, natural abstract artwork.
calm_nature_background.usage: Use as a subtle hero background image or section divider. Max opacity 10% (bg-white/90 over it).

abstract_ai_shape.usage: Use as a visual placeholder or abstract representation of the AI companion in greeting cards. Clip to rounded shapes.

sleep_companion_bg.description: Star-filled night sky above a serene horizon with subtle light glow.
sleep_companion_bg.usage: Background for 'Sleep Companion Mode'. Overlay with heavy #0B131E/80 gradient for text legibility.

iconography.style: Duotone, size 24 for main actions, size 20 for list items. Match to text color.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind exclusively for structural layouts. Do NOT use Shadcn Card for complex bento grids; use pure div elements to maintain complete spacing control.
Implement the 'Voice-based AI emotional support chat' with a clear, floating 'Push-to-Talk' mic button that has a pulsing ring animation when active.
For the Mood tracking dashboard, utilize Recharts with soft, rounded bar charts and curved lines. Use the defined #8A9A86 and #E8A87C colors.
For the guided breathing module, implement a minimalist Framer Motion animated circle that expands on inhale (4s) and shrinks on exhale (4s).
Do NOT use pure #000000 or pure #FFFFFF. Rely on the provided earthy palette.
For the 'Crisis detection', strictly use the 'crisis' color (#D9534F) for the CTA, ensuring a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against its background.
Include data-testid on every clickable element and form input for testability.
Ensure 'Sleep Companion Mode' reverses the UI to the dark palette: bg-[#0B131E] and text-[#E1E7EE].
